children.text: projects that support the enhancement of advanced nursing education and practice; and
traineeships for individuals in advanced nursing education programs.

children.heading: Definition of advanced education nurses
children.label: b Definition of advanced education nurses
children.text: For purposes of this section, the term “advanced education nurses” means individuals trained in advanced degree programs including individuals in combined R.N./graduate degree programs, post-nursing master’s certificate programs, or, in the case of nurse midwives, in certificate programs in existence on the date that is one day prior to , to serve as nurse practitioners, clinical nurse specialists, nurse midwives, nurse anesthetists, nurse educators, nurse administrators, clinical nurse leaders, or public health nurses, or in other nurse specialties determined by the Secretary to require advanced education.November 13, 1998
meet guidelines prescribed by the Secretary; and

have as their objective the education of nurses who will upon completion of their studies in such programs, be qualified to effectively provide primary health care, including primary health care in homes and in ambulatory care facilities, long-term care facilities, acute care, and other health care settings.
have as their objective the education of midwives; and
are accredited by the American College of Nurse-Midwives Accreditation Commission for Midwifery Education.
provide registered nurses with full-time anesthetist education; and
are accredited by the Council on Accreditation of Nurse Anesthesia Educational Programs.

children.heading: Authorized clinical nurse specialist programs
children.label: f Authorized clinical nurse specialist programs

children.text: provide registered nurses with full-time clinical nurse specialist education; and

have as their objective the education of clinical nurse specialists who will, upon completion of such a program, be qualified to effectively provide care through the wellness and illness continuum to inpatients and outpatients experiencing acute and chronic illness.

children.heading: Other authorized educational programs
children.label: g Other authorized educational programs
children.text: The Secretary shall prescribe guidelines as appropriate for other advanced nurse education programs eligible for support under this section.

children.label: A
children.text: the tuition, books, and fees of the program of advanced nurse education with respect to which the traineeship is provided; and

children.label: B
children.text: the reasonable living expenses of the individual during the period for which the traineeship is provided.

children.heading: Special consideration
children.label: 2 Special consideration
children.text: In making awards of grants and contracts under subsection (a)(2), the Secretary shall give special consideration to an eligible entity that agrees to expend the award to train advanced education nurses who will practice in health professional shortage areas designated under .section 254e of this title
